mano_cua.result_summary: Vue Notion开发示例页面(localhost:8080)仅显示'todo:'文本，无YouTube视频嵌入内容。DevTools Console确认document.querySelectorAll('iframe').length=0，页面上零个iframe。开发示例不包含YouTube嵌入的Notion页面数据，无法测试YouTube全屏功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Dev example page only shows 'todo:' text. DOM inspection confirms 0 iframes on the page. No YouTube embed content available to test fullscreen functionality.
